name: development-workflow
description: Generic development workflow skills for Codex agents: project context bootstrap, workflow routing, evidence-based handoff, post-merge protocol, PR fix continuation, review gates, decision-lock/product-drift checks, deploy checks, dirty worktree safety, and wrong-direction recovery after user feedback.

interface.longDescription: Helps Codex agents work from project evidence: repository context bootstrap, skill/workflow routing, branch and PR state, post-merge updates, same-PR fixes, monster review tracking, decision-lock checks against accepted product and compatibility decisions, deploy checks, prod-ready checks, dirty worktree handling, wrong-direction recovery after user feedback, and redacted handoff output.
defaultPrompt: Use $project-context-bootstrap before project-sensitive work to read repository rules, memory/history, git/PR state, blockers, and the next safe action.
Use $project-workflow-router when more than one workflow may apply, so the agent chooses the minimal relevant skill chain before acting.
Use $development-handoff after a merge, PR fix, review, deploy, decision-drift complaint, or interrupted agent session.
Use $feedback-recovery when the user says the current result is wrong, off-spec, drifted from an accepted decision, or not pixel-perfect.
